# cortexcloud_appsec_rule_labels (Data Source)

Provides a list of available rule labels.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cortexcloud_appsec_rule_labels" "all" {
}

output "available_labels" {
  value = data.cortexcloud_appsec_rule_labels.all.labels
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Static identifier for the data source.
- `labels` (List of String) The list of available rule labels.
